title: Ubiquiti EP-54V-72W, EdgePower, 54V, 72W
category: Powering / Industrial powersource / Power sources with charging (UPS)
description: The EdgePower 54V 72W is a UNMS monitored and managed 54V DC power supply with integrated battery backup. This product provides WISPs with an easy-to-install 54V redundant power supply that includes a management user interface, SNMP, and simple 12V battery backup charger with multiple 54V outputs for small sites 100-240VAC, 50-60 Hz, Universal Input 54V DC Output (terminal connector with dual DC barrel jack included) 12V Lead Acid Battery Input* Two, 10/100 Ethernet, 54V Passive PoE output, switch-ports *12V Battery not included Device Power cord Mount brackets Screws and Anchors Powe cable with DC jack Power cable with Ring Terminals
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100Mbps Power Pin powering 4,5 (+), 7,8 (-) Charging function Yes PoE-Out standards Passive 54V Power [W] 72 Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 2 Output Voltage [V] 54 PoE budget [W] 72 Output Current [A] 1,3 Max. power consumption [W] 2 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Max. operating humidity [%] 90 Construction Rackmount Input and output power Terminal block Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 650 Width [mm] 192 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 115
